data.title: Russell 2000 Poised For Major Technical Breakout: Analyst Eyes 'A Trend Reversal In Favor Of Small Caps Outperforming' S&P 500
data.description: Russell 2000 Index, a benchmark for small-cap stocks, may break out to levels not seen since November 2021. Strong economy and low rates could propel it.

data.title: Why Aspen Aerogels Shares Are Seeing Blue Skies On Wednesday
data.description: Aspen Aerogels, Inc. (NYSE: ASPN) has received a conditional commitment for a DOE loan worth $670.6 million and plans to construct a new manufacturing facility. Expecting revenue of $1.2-1.6 billion and 550 construction jobs.

data.title: Tech Stocks Stall, Small Caps Surge As Regional Banks Rally, Airlines Rocket: What's Driving Markets Wednesday?
data.description: Small-cap stocks outperformed large caps in Wednesday's session, with the Russell 2000 Index surging to test July 2024 highs on the back of expectations for interest rate cuts and a strong rally in regional banks.

data.title: Amazon Prime Video India to Introduce Ads in 2025, Intensifying Rivalry with Reliance and Disney+
data.description: Amazon Prime Video in India plans to introduce limited ads by 2025 in support of ongoing content investments, with an ad-free version available.

data.title: A Look Into Delta Air Lines Inc's Price Over Earnings
